name: Craig Arnold
background: Craig Arnold is Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Eaton. He was appointed Chairman and CEO on June 1, 2016. Previously, he served as President and Chief Operating Officer of Eaton and as Vice Chairman and Chief Operating Officer of the Industrial Sector. He joined Eaton in 2000 as Senior Vice President and Group Executive of the Fluid Power Group. Prior to Eaton, he held various leadership positions at General Electric.
